name: Create Agent
description: Creates and initialises a new agent for the authenticated user. Agents are identified by human-readable names and persist in the user's lattice state. Idempotent: creating an existing agent is a no-op. Set overwrite=true to replace an existing (e.g. TERMINATED) agent with fresh state.

state.description: Optional initial state for the transition function. Use this to seed transition-function-specific configuration (e.g. LLM provider, model, system prompt).

overwrite.description: If true, replace an existing agent with fresh state. Default false.

created.description: True if a new agent was created, false if it already existed
